briefs.tldr: **v3.1 shipped — 24/7 workflow is live.** Apple hub + [Papers](./section.html?kind=papers) / [Learning](./section.html?kind=learning) / [Projects](./section.html?kind=projects) / [Experiments](./section.html?kind=experiments) / [Feedback](./feedback.html). Three launchd crons installed on your laptop (morning 07:00, daytime 12:00 & 17:00 weekdays, night 22:00). GitHub Actions fallback at 07:15. D001–D009 locked. Review the hub, tap feedback, ping me.
briefs.tldr_short: v3.1 shipped end-to-end. Apple hub, 4 inner sections, /feedback, cron infra (launchd + GHA), all 9 decisions locked.
